title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud unveiled an enhanced agent platform featuring a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform Agent Builder with no-code/low-code design capabilities. The platform includes an Agent Registry and marketplace for component distribution, enterprise governance tools, observability with time-travel debugging, evaluation suites, and a managed simulation environment. Additional features encompass an expanded Agent Development Kit (ADK) with broader language support, native agent-to-agent communication, and a secure code execution sandbox.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through updates to the company's agent platform, centered on a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform Agent Builder that adds no-code and low-code design. The release matters because it bundles orchestration, distribution, and operational tooling into one stack: an Agent Registry and marketplace for sharing components, enterprise governance controls, observability with time-travel debugging, evaluation suites, and a managed simulation environment. The Agent Development Kit expands with broader language support, native agent-to-agent communication, and a secure code execution sandbox.
